---
title: "06 — Treatment Panels: Multi-Figure"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/R/helpers.R")
```

## Load RF-scored articles

```{r load}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

rf_scored_dir <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "rf_scored")
scored_files <- list.files(rf_scored_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)
message("Found ", length(scored_files), " scored year files")

# Load all scored articles
dt_all <- rbindlist(lapply(scored_files, read_parquet), fill = TRUE)
message("Total articles: ", nrow(dt_all))
message("Year range: ", min(dt_all$year, na.rm = TRUE), "-",
        max(dt_all$year, na.rm = TRUE))
```

## Load article text for keyword matching

```{r load-text}
scored_dir_text <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_scored")
scored_text_files <- list.files(scored_dir_text, pattern = "\\.parquet$",
                                full.names = TRUE)
message("Found ", length(scored_text_files), " scored text files")
```

## Build panels for each figure

```{r build-panels}
# Helper: build a treatment panel for one figure
build_figure_panel <- function(fig_key, fig_config, dt, text_files) {
  message("\n", strrep("=", 60))
  message("Building panel for: ", fig_config$name, " (", fig_key, ")")
  message(strrep("=", 60))

  outpath <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, paste0("did_panel_", fig_key, ".parquet"))
  if (file.exists(outpath)) {
    message("Panel already exists, skipping. Delete to rebuild.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # --- Step 1: Flag figure-related articles ---
  pattern <- regex(
    paste0("\\b(", paste(fig_config$keywords, collapse = "|"), ")\\b"),
    ignore_case = TRUE
  )

  message("Flagging articles matching: ", paste(fig_config$keywords, collapse = " | "))

  figure_flags <- list()
  for (sf in text_files) {
    yr <- as.integer(gsub(".*scored_(\\d{4})\\.parquet", "\\1", sf))

    # Apply year guardrail to avoid false positives
    if (yr < fig_config$min_year) next

    dt_yr <- as.data.table(read_parquet(sf, col_select = c("article_id", "article")))
    dt_yr[, is_figure := as.integer(str_detect(tolower(article), pattern))]
    figure_flags[[as.character(yr)]] <- dt_yr[, .(article_id, is_figure)]
    rm(dt_yr)
  }

  figure_df <- rbindlist(figure_flags)
  message("  Figure-mentioning articles: ", sum(figure_df$is_figure))

  if (sum(figure_df$is_figure) == 0) {
    message("  WARNING: No articles found for ", fig_config$name, ". Skipping.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # Merge flag into article data
  dt_fig <- copy(dt)
  dt_fig <- merge(dt_fig, figure_df, by = "article_id", all.x = TRUE)
  dt_fig[is.na(is_figure), is_figure := 0L]

  # Filter to study window
  study_years <- fig_config$study_start:fig_config$study_end
  dt_fig <- dt_fig[year %in% study_years]
  message("  Articles in study window (", fig_config$study_start, "-",
          fig_config$study_end, "): ", nrow(dt_fig))

  if (nrow(dt_fig) == 0) {
    message("  WARNING: No articles in study window. Skipping.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # --- Step 2: Build newspaper x month panel ---
  dt_fig[, ym_date := as.Date(paste0(year_month, "-01"))]
  dt_fig[, time_id := (as.integer(format(ym_date, "%Y")) - 1774L) * 12L +
                       as.integer(format(ym_date, "%m"))]

  panel <- dt_fig[, .(
    incivil_rate_rf = mean(p_incivil[is_figure == 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    incivil_rate_lexicon = mean(uncivil_score[is_figure == 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    figure_count = sum(is_figure),
    figure_share = mean(is_figure),
    n_articles = .N,
    n_articles_non_figure = sum(is_figure == 0),
    mean_words = mean(n_words, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ocr = mean(ocr_quality, na.rm = TRUE),
    front_page_share = mean(front_page, na.rm = TRUE)
  ), by = .(newspaper_name, year_month, ym_date, time_id)]

  setorder(panel, newspaper_name, ym_date)

  # --- Step 3: Define treatment (sustained coverage) ---
  # Treated if >= 2 figure articles in >= 2 of 3 consecutive months
  panel[, sustained := {
    n <- .N
    flag <- rep(0L, n)
    if (n >= 3) {
      for (i in 1:(n - 2)) {
        months_with <- sum(figure_count[i:(i+2)] >= 2)
        if (months_with >= 2) {
          flag[i] <- 1L
          break
        }
      }
    }
    flag
  }, by = newspaper_name]

  treat_info <- panel[sustained == 1,
                      .(treat_date = min(ym_date), treat_time_id = min(time_id)),
                      by = newspaper_name]

  panel <- merge(panel, treat_info, by = "newspaper_name", all.x = TRUE)
  panel[, treated := as.integer(!is.na(treat_date) & ym_date >= treat_date)]
  panel[is.na(treated), treated := 0L]
  panel[, treat_cohort := fifelse(!is.na(treat_time_id), treat_time_id, 0L)]
  panel[, newspaper_id := as.integer(factor(newspaper_name))]

  # --- Step 4: Filter ---
  # Keep newspapers with at least 12 months of observations
  np_counts <- panel[, .N, by = newspaper_name]
  keep_nps <- np_counts[N >= 12, newspaper_name]
  panel <- panel[newspaper_name %in% keep_nps]

  # Keep newspaper-months with at least 5 non-figure articles
  panel <- panel[n_articles_non_figure >= 5]

  # Drop helper columns
  panel[, c("sustained", "ym_date") := NULL]

  # --- Summary ---
  n_treated <- uniqueN(panel[treated == 1, newspaper_name])
  n_control <- uniqueN(panel[is.na(treat_date), newspaper_name])
  message("  Panel: ", nrow(panel), " newspaper-months, ",
          uniqueN(panel$newspaper_name), " newspapers")
  message("  Treated: ", n_treated, " newspapers, ",
          sum(panel$treated), " newspaper-months")
  message("  Never-treated: ", n_control, " newspapers")

  if (n_treated == 0) {
    message("  WARNING: No treated newspapers found. Panel not saved.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # --- Save ---
  write_parquet(panel, outpath)
  message("  Saved: ", outpath)

  # Also save CSV for inspection
  write.csv(panel, file.path(DATA_PANELS, paste0("did_panel_", fig_key, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)

  return(invisible(panel))
}

# Build panels for all figures
for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  tryCatch(
    build_figure_panel(fig_key, FIGURES[[fig_key]], dt_all, scored_text_files),
    error = function(e) {
      message("ERROR building panel for ", fig_key, ": ", e$message)
    }
  )
  gc()
}

message("\n\nAll panels built.")
```

## Panel summary

```{r summary}
panel_files <- list.files(DATA_PANELS, pattern = "^did_panel_.*\\.parquet$",
                          full.names = TRUE)
message("Panel files found: ", length(panel_files))

for (pf in panel_files) {
  fig_key <- gsub(".*did_panel_(.*)\\.parquet", "\\1", pf)
  fig_name <- if (fig_key %in% names(FIGURES)) FIGURES[[fig_key]]$name else fig_key
  p <- as.data.table(read_parquet(pf))

  p[, ever_treated := as.integer(!is.na(treat_date))]

  summary_by_group <- p[, .(
    `N newspaper-months` = .N,
    `N newspapers` = uniqueN(newspaper_name),
    `Mean incivility (RF)` = round(mean(incivil_rate_rf, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    `Mean incivility (lexicon)` = round(mean(incivil_rate_lexicon, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    `Mean figure count` = round(mean(figure_count), 2),
    `Mean articles/month` = round(mean(n_articles), 1)
  ), by = .(Group = fifelse(ever_treated == 1, "Treated", "Never Treated"))]

  tex <- knitr::kable(summary_by_group, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE,
                      caption = paste0("Summary Statistics: ", fig_name))
  save_table(tex, paste0("summary_stats_", fig_key))
  message("Saved summary table for ", fig_name)

  rm(p)
  gc()
}
```
